title: Simple Waypoint - Hypixel SkyBlock Gadget
description: Add a simple waypoint by a button click.
body:
### Note
This mod requires [hsglib](https://modrinth.com/mod/hsglib). Mod Menu and YetAnotherConfigLib(YACL) are also required to open config screen.
### Simple Waypoint
Can't find where to continue farming after killing pests or serveing guests? Press the KEY_BIND to add a simple waypoint where you at and long press it to remove it. There is also a config screen to set the icon, scale, color and ticks to clear the waypoint.
### Appearance
See more at [gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/hsgsimplewaypoint/gallery)
### ![Waypoint Appearance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/t1jrMk7n/images/091f7755b638b5de587833592dab8bbbdf3b53ce.png)
